items.name: Alter Egos Series 1: Unicado
items.merchantDescription: Do not eat this unicorn. I know it looks like an avocado, but it's only *kind of* an avocado. I mean, it would probably taste delicious, like a cross between buttercream and arugula. But don't eat it. Don't even think about eating it. And definitely don't look

items.name: Alter Egos Series 1: Rainbowcado
items.merchantDescription: Rainbows make everything better. A cupcake? How about a rainbow-colored cupcake! A small poodle? Let's try a rainbow-colored small poodle! Hazy memories of your childhood? Definitely better when they're rainbow-colored! Existential dread? If it's rainbow-color

items.name: Alter Egos Series 1: Avocato
items.merchantDescription: Know what cats like? A variable, multi-nutrient diet high in protein! And cuddles! And a variety of predator-centric sensory stimulation! And hanging out with people who are allergic to them! And...avocados? No idea! Could be! I'm not totally sure where I was
